title: amaryllis × haylockii
intro: Amaryllis × haylockii, also known as the Belladonna Lily, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its striking white trumpet-shaped flowers with a reddish-purple center. The plant's bulbs and leaves contain alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × haylockii include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity. Amaryllis × haylockii can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical salve, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
